findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "connect" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Returns connection status and URLs. When all providers are connected, returns authenticated:true and empty pending[]. When credentials are missing, returns conn…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "marketplace" is 1328 chars, far longer than this server's median (183). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: THE official mcp.ai marketplace — the in-platform catalog of every MCP/tool, AND the way to run them. When the user wants a capability ("find an MCP that does X…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "authenticate" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
